title: Pi Agent explained in 6min..
summary: Caleb Writes Code discusses Pi, described as a unique agent framework that opens multiple use cases like OpenClaw. The video compares Pi against frontier coding agents such as Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, and Antigravity, examining how Pi handles complexity in the harness layer as agent products become more feature-rich.
